name: EZPAWN
description_short: EZPAWN is a national pawn shop chain offering collateral-based loans, gold buying, firearms services, and pre-owned merchandise at 25–70% off retail.
description_long:
EZPAWN is a national pawn shop chain with locations across the United States, including this store at 1501 E. Charleston Blvd. in Las Vegas, NV. As part of a larger corporate pawn operation, EZPAWN has standardized its processes and technology more than independent pawn shops, offering digital tools like an online instant quote system and a loyalty rewards program. The Las Vegas Charleston location also carries specialty services including firearms loans and auto loans, which are not available at every EZPAWN location.

The store's core offering is collateral-based pawn loans: customers bring in items of value — electronics, jewelry, gold, firearms, tools, and more — receive a cash loan against those items, and can later redeem them by repaying the loan plus fees. In addition to loans, EZPAWN buys gold and diamond jewelry outright, and purchases firearms. The retail side of the business sells pre-owned brand-name merchandise at claimed discounts of 25% to 70% off retail pricing, with new inventory arriving daily. Customers can also access layaway (10% down, monthly payments) and a 'Take Today' buy-now-pay-later option through third-party partners for up to 12 months.

What distinguishes EZPAWN from independent pawn shops is its digital infrastructure. The EZ+ Rewards Program lets customers manage pawns, layaways, and reward points online or via app, and make online payments on pawn extensions — a convenience most independent shops lack. The instant quote tool allows customers to get an estimated value for electronics before visiting the store. Product Protection Plans and a Jewelry VIP Program (with guaranteed loan amounts and free cleaning) add a retail-like layer to the pawn experience.

Honestly, EZPAWN is a legitimate option for fast cash when you have assets to pledge, but the website deliberately omits the most important numbers: loan interest rates, fees, and APRs are not disclosed anywhere online. Pawn loans are among the most expensive forms of short-term credit, and customers must visit the store to understand the true cost. The service is best used as a last resort for short-term liquidity, not as a regular financial tool. Borrowers who cannot redeem their items lose them permanently.
pros: EZ+ Rewards Program lets customers manage pawns, layaways, and payments online or via app
Online instant quote tool for electronics — get an estimated value before visiting the store
Online pawn extension and layaway payments available (except AZ, OR, PA)
Pre-owned merchandise sold at 25–70% off retail with daily new inventory
Accepts firearms as collateral and for outright purchase at this location
Layaway available year-round with only 10% down and monthly payments
Expert gold buyers test all precious metals for fair pricing on gold and diamonds
cons: Loan interest rates, fees, and APRs are not disclosed on the website — must visit in-store
Auto loans and firearms services are location-specific and not universally available
Online payments not available in Arizona, Oregon, or Pennsylvania
Firearm appraisal amounts and loan values are entirely at each store's discretion
Sunday hours are significantly reduced (12pm–5pm vs. 9am–7pm weekdays)
best_for: People needing same-day cash who have electronics, jewelry, tools, or firearms to pledge
Bargain hunters seeking pre-owned brand-name electronics, jewelry, or gear at steep discounts
Gun owners looking to borrow against or sell firearms at a licensed dealer
Shoppers who prefer layaway or deferred payment options on pre-owned merchandise
diagnosis: EZPAWN is best suited for consumers who need immediate cash against physical assets and have no access to lower-cost credit, or for bargain shoppers seeking deeply discounted pre-owned goods. The main caveat is that loan costs — interest rates and fees — are intentionally absent from the website, meaning the true cost of borrowing is only revealed in-store; pawn loans are typically very expensive credit and should be treated as a last resort.
services: EZ+ Rewards Program (points on pawn, redeem, sell, purchase)
Online pawn extension and layaway payments
Take Today buy-now-pay-later financing (up to 12 months via third-party)
Product Protection Plan for electronics and A/V equipment
Jewelry VIP Program (guaranteed loan amounts, free cleaning, stone replacement)
